infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: PropertyHub needs location access to show nearby properties and provide location-based services.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: PropertyHub needs location access to show nearby properties and provide location-based services.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: PropertyHub needs camera access to take photos of properties and upload profile pictures.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: PropertyHub needs microphone access for voice messages in chat.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: PropertyHub needs photo library access to upload property images and profile pictures.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow PropertyHub to use your location to show nearby properties and provide location-based services.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow PropertyHub to access your camera to take photos of properties and upload profile pictures.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow PropertyHub to access your photo library to upload property images and profile pictures.
plugins.savePhotosPermission: Allow PropertyHub to save photos to your library.

plugins.microphonePermission: Allow PropertyHub to access your microphone for voice messages in chat.
